mission: SYNK is a student-focused initiative redefining how students form meaningful connections. By centring community around sport rather than conventional networking, we make it straightforward to find teammates, join organised activities, and build an active social presence on campus. Our mission is simple: play to connect.
pullQuote: Our mission is simple: play to connect.

playFirst.title: Play First
playFirst.description: We replace small talk with sport. Shared physical activity creates genuine rapport with no forced ice-breakers required.

inclusive.title: Inclusive by Design
inclusive.description: No prior experience necessary. Every skill level is welcome.

community.title: Community-Driven
community.description: Built by students, run by students, shaped by students.

wellbeing.title: Student Wellbeing
wellbeing.description: Physical activity and social connection are both fundamental to student wellbeing. Synk supports both simultaneously.

sportNetworking.title: Sport-Based Networking
sportNetworking.description: Structured play sessions open to all skill levels where connection happens through movement, not forced conversation.

matchmaking.title: Matchmaking Activities
matchmaking.description: Participants are paired into teams so no one arrives or leaves alone.

gameNights.title: Casual Game Nights
gameNights.description: Board games, team challenges, and light competitive formats.

tournaments.title: Community Tournaments
tournaments.description: Friendly competitions between student groups, residencies, and departments.

campusActivations.title: Campus Activations
campusActivations.description: Pop-up events and open sessions across campus.

footer.bottomNote: © 2024 Synk. Made with ❤️ by students in Helsinki.
